publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-05-25 18:23:34 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Letters, legal records, and news clippings.
did.abstract: Clippings, engineering reports, letters, financial records, legal records, travel notes, and articles of Ross L. Baker.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Ross Lee Baker Papers, #3629. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Cornell University Class of 1907. Ross L. Baker was an inventor and an engineer. He organized R. L. Baker and Co. Engineers, a firm of consulting engineers in New York City who worked with development of early electrical power companies as well as production, distribution, and use of electricity.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, clippings, engineering reports, patent, financial records, legal records, travel notes, articles, publications, and personal papers of Ross Lee Baker.

did.unittitle: Greenwood Union School Commencement Recital programs
Competitive exams for Cornell University scholarships
Public utilities (brokerage): Durham vs. Duke power
Public utilities (brokerage): New England (S. W. Plate)
Electric Distribution: Method of Estimating Lost Current in Electric Distribution
Electric Distribution: Methods of Limiting Lost Energy in Electric Distribution
Electrical Distribution: Report for Electrical Distribution Department of Doherty Operating Co.
N.E.L.A. Report on the Secondary Network and Banking of Transformers
Report forms and models: Transmission Line
Boulder and Orodell, Colorado: water supply
Golden, Colorado: Jefferson County Power and Light Company
Marshall and Eldorado Springs, Colorado: water records
Sterling and Lyons, Kansas: summary of engineer's report
Minnesota Gas and Electric Company: auditor's report
Joplin, Missouri: report on proposed distribution system
Moberly (Mo.) Light & Power Co.: engineer's report
Trenton (Mo.) Gas & Electric Co.: engineer's report
Long Island Electric Railway Company & New York & Long Island Traction Company: preliminary report
New York & Queens Railway Co., N. Y. & Long Island Traction Co., Long Island Electric Railway Co., Montauk Water Co.
New York & North Jersey Rapid Transit Company: estimate of gross earnings, engineer's report
Tuckaseegee Hydraulic project, North Carolina: estimate
Auglaize Power Company, Defiance, Ohio: summary of engineers' report
Lima Territory, Ohio: engineer's estimate on power supply
Lima, Ohio: business estimate on transmission project and property purchase
Lorain, Ohio: engineer's report on The Citizens Gas & Electric Company
Parr Shoals, Columbia, S. C.: earnings & hydro electric development reports
Kingsport, Tenn.: summary of field notes
Publications Misc.: interconnections between power systems
N.E.L.A. (National Electrical Light Association): Accident Prevention Course for Linemen
N.E.L.A.: Design and Construction of Distribution Systems
N.E.L.A.: Specifications for Overhead Construction Materials
N.E.L.A.: Rate Reduction In the Last Three Years
N.E.L.A.: Valuation for Rate Making Purposes
Maryland, District of Columbia, Virginia, West Virginia, North Carolina, South Carolina
Valuation and Rate making for Public Utilities: notes, miscellany
Identification: passport, various documents and cards
Miscellaneous: writings, notes, personnel lists, etc.
